capabilities_used.evidence: 2024-11-27 推文明确写道: "One way to view it is as a 3-year cup and handle, with major resistance at 4k. Once that’s cleared, a measured move places it north of..."；图 #4 也直接画出长周期 cup-and-handle，并从 4k 上方做 measured move 到 15k+。

2024-10-29: "The 3-month ascending triangle that formed after the August scare is nearing completion. $ETH is poised for a move to the 4k range."；2024-01-15 也提到 "18-month asc. tri."；图 #5、#7 都是水平压制 + 抬升低点的上升三角/压缩结构。

2024-12-22: "currently forming the right shoulder of a potential iHS continuation. This setup will provide the momentum to break 4k and target 10k by May."；2024-10-24 也写 "we could interpret it as forming an iHS or an asc. triangle."
他长期把 ETH 定义为强趋势资产，例如 2025-01-26: "I’ve never seen a chart as strong as $ETH."；2025-01-31: "the charts say to stay BULLISH af"。整体框架不是均值回归，而是把大级别结构视为持续上升趋势。

2024-05-28: "$BTC dominance won't reach 70%, nor will it reach 60%. It has topped and is heading lower, driven by $ETH strength, which will kickstart the long-awaited Alt Season."；2024-01-13 也说 BTC.D topped，ETH season 要来。
2025-02-22: "This is my 4th cycle in the crypto markets, and one rule stands firm: FUD marks the bottoms."；多条推文使用 "this cycle"、"bull cycle"、"phase two of the bull market" 等周期叙事来定性 ETH 所处阶段。
他多次把 2025 年 Q1/Q2 设为 ETH 抛物线阶段，例如 2024-12-31: "$6500 by March $10000 by May ... $18000 end of 2025."；这类按季度推进的路径依赖，很像减半后牛市阶段划分。

2025-02-26: "$ETH is now back at the lower end of its 13-month re-accumulation range... healthy, albeit boring, sideways accumulation."；2025-09-21: "$ETH trapped between 4K and 5K. Range isn’t done yet." 他频繁把市场描述为箱体/再积累区间。

虽然不直接用 Wyckoff 术语，但大量使用 re-accumulation、shakeout、hard retest、smart money style 语言。2024-06-30: "We're in a re-accumulation phase within a bull market"；2024-12-20: "They’re shaking you out of the market before the big move to 10k."
2025-08-18: "flushing shorts above 4,800 and longs below 4,200"；2025-09-29: "Now that we’ve swept the 4K lows"。他经常把波动解释为先扫流动性、再走主趋势。
2025-03-25: "The 3D RSI was at its lowest levels... These lows have historically signaled $ETH cycle bottoms."；2024-06-21 与 2024-06-26 对 ETHBTC 明确提到 weekly bullish divergence。
他不算均线型交易员，但图里经常把斜率支撑/趋势恢复画成收复关键结构后再起涨。图 #8 显示跌破后重新收回前下降结构并准备上攻 3,186/4,350 阻力，逻辑接近关键均线/关键趋势收回。

他经常强调市场通过下破/上破制造 FUD 或 shakeout。2024-07-29: "ETF news pullback, as anticipated, is now complete"；2024-12-20: "You didn’t believe we could drop from 4k ... this is an opportunity before we head to 10k." 典型把破位视为陷阱而非趋势反转。
2024-07-23: "Spot Ethereum ETF trading volume surpasses $1 billion on the first day."；2025-01-30: "The catalyst that will send it to Valhalla? The staked $ETH ETF." 他会把 ETF 叙事作为上涨催化，但不是主框架。
2025-08-24: "Next FOMC will be a sell-the-news event. Until then, higher." 偶尔用宏观事件做节奏微调，但明显次于图表结构。
虽然他常抄大级别支撑，但并不是盲接飞刀，而是等自己定义的支撑/底部结构。2024-06-24: "Bought the dip"；2024-09-23: "dips below $2300 were prime buying zones." 他的 dip-buying 建立在结构支撑之上。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Box Re-accumulation Range
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify prolonged horizontal or slightly rising consolidation boxes inside a broader bull trend; treat boredom, failed breakdowns, and repeated support holds as accumulation before expansion.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别牛市主趋势中的长时间横盘或轻微上倾箱体；将无聊震荡、假跌破与支撑反复守住视为再积累，后续倾向于向上扩张。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-26: "13-month re-accumulation range"；2024-06-30: "re-accumulation phase within a bull market"；2025-09-21: "trapped between 4K and 5K"。这是他最反复使用但 seed 里没有被单独命名的核心框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sell in May Crypto Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: Sell in May 季节性模板
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Project crypto cycle path with a recurring pattern: bullish Q1/Q2 expansion into May, then profit-taking, correction, and later re-expansion into year-end.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用季节性模板推演加密周期：Q1/Q2 上涨并在 5 月前后到达阶段高点，然后止盈回调，年内后段再展开下一段行情。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 #1、#2、#3 多次在 5 月垂线附近直接写上 "SELL IN MAY AND RUN AWAY"；2024-11-25: "Bullish on $ETH until May, aiming for 10k. Then, take profits and step back."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: ETH-Led Rotation Thesis
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track capital rotation from BTC, SOL, XRP, ADA, or memecoins into ETH; treat that relative-strength transfer as the main engine of the next leg of the bull market.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 追踪资金从 BTC、SOL、XRP、ADA 或 meme 板块轮动到 ETH；把这种相对强弱切换视为下一段牛市的核心驱动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-23: "Full rotation from $SOL, $XRP, and $ADA to $ETH has started."；2024-11-27: "Rotation from $BTC and $SOL to $ETH is going to be brutal."

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Capitulation Bottom
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use extreme public disbelief, influencer bearishness, or panic narratives as confirmation that a larger bottom or accumulation zone is forming.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把市场极度不信、KOL 看空或恐慌叙事，当作更大级别底部或积累区正在形成的确认信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-22: "FUD marks the bottoms."；2024-07-25: "The disbelief in $ETH right now is out of control. This is exactly the sentiment I like to see."

personal_quirks.quote: Bullish on $ETH until May, aiming for 10k. Then, take profits and step back. The real play is for 20k by the end of 2025.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先做第一段主升到 5 月，随后主动止盈，不恋战；更长线目标另外再看。

personal_quirks.quote: This is my 4th cycle in the crypto markets, and one rule stands firm: FUD marks the bottoms.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 舆论越恐慌，越要警惕这是反向买点，而不是追空点。

personal_quirks.quote: The more it drags on, the more people will give up. It’s the calm before the storm that takes us to 10k.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 长时间无聊整理不是坏事，反而在为更大的趋势行情蓄能。

personal_quirks.quote: They’re shaking you out of the market before the big move to 10k.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键支撑附近的下杀常被他解释为洗盘，而非趋势终结。

personal_quirks.quote: I’m still waiting for $ETH’s god candle.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他偏好压缩末端后的爆发式单边扩张，并愿意为此长期持有观点。

unique_traits: 他不是均衡型 TA 交易员，而是高度 ETH 中心化、带强叙事输出能力的结构派多头。与一般只讲形态的分析师不同，他把长周期压缩、轮动逻辑、季节性路径和群体情绪逆向结合成一套“ETH 终将爆发”的单边框架。图表上最有辨识度的是多年级别压缩结构、再积累箱体，以及明确写出时间路径和目标区间。
